ops.text: The capt-hook verbose-comment gate blocks Edit calls that REDUCE a verbose non-doc comment: a sweep lane tried to replace an 8-line file-header comment in wire/lifeproto/gen/spec.go with a mandated 2-line version and the gate refused, because it evaluates the pre-edit comment rather than the post-edit result. The lane had to bypass via a raw Python file write. A gate meant to discourage verbose comments should compare the RESULTING comment against the threshold — shrinking edits should sail through.
